description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 31, 2025 at 6:43 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Inglewood, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on E. Fairview Boulevard at N. La Brea Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on E. Fairview Boulevard and came to a stop for a queue of traffic turning left at the intersection 
with N. La Brea Avenue. A passenger car approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the 
rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
